This '''individual''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as the High Master during the [[Golden Age of the Old Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], this man was [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], serving as a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] during the [[Golden Age of the Old Republic]]. By [[340 BBY]], this man served as High Master at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]], and debriefed members of the Order as they returned from missions.<ref name="TCPL" />

During his tenure, the High Master received reports from a [[Unidentified blue-skinned Jedi|blue-skinned Jedi]] who had fought [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], a [[Unidentified yellow-eyed Twi'lek Jedi|yellow-eyed]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] who had prevented the assassination of a diplomat, and [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda's]] report on the loss of the ''[[Chu'unthor]]'' on [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]].<ref name="TCPL" />

==Legacy==
Several centuries later, [[Holovid/Legends|holorecords]] of these debriefings survived the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]] due to the diligence of the [[Last Curator of Records|last]] [[Curator of Records]]. Hiding them away on [[Toola/Legends|Toola]], the Curator was eventually hunted down and executed by [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] and his [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]. While the Sith destroyed most of the records with [[Electromagnetic pulse grenade/Legends|EMP grenades]] and [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonators]], partial recordings survived to be discovered by the fledgling [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and his [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]], [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]].<ref name="TCPL" />

==Appearances==
